top_risks: CLIENT-REJECT (sev 8): You promised 20+ photos but only delivered 10 — the asset inventory literally lists the same placeholder '[image] The 20+ photos the client will provide' repeated and only 10 actual images show up. I'm not approving half a batch.

AGENT CHOKE on 'photo_batch[0]': This image was clearly AI-generated and programmatically degraded, not a real client photo — the agent's asset_add_file ingest loop will hit this first and the artificial darkening/vignette profile won't match any real-world degradation preset, causing image_apply_auto_tone to overcorrect and blow the baseline for the entire batch.
Completeness 4/10: Batch is 50% of the minimum required count; workflow loop over 20+ cannot be demonstrated
qc_gaps: Per-asset self-QC averages 9.3/10, but package Completeness scored 4 — assets are individually strong yet wrong/insufficient for the task.
